memoryArtifacts.headline: Affeton Manor / Castle, Worlington, Devonshire, England
memoryArtifacts.description:
Manor of Affeton
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

 "Affeton Castle", the gatehouse of the former manor house of Affeton, restored to a private residence in 1868-9.
 
Affeton is a former historic manor in Devon. It was at one time also a parish with its own parish church, but was later merged into the parish of West Worlington. The manor house was almost entirely demolished in the Civil War, the only part left standing was the gatehouse, which fell into ruin. A large farmhouse known as "Affeton Barton" was soon after built over the foundations and cellars of the manor house. The ruinous gatehouse was converted in 1868-9 to a shooting box for the use of the Stucley family of Hartland Abbey and Moreton House, Bideford, and became known thereafter as "Affeton Castle".

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Stuckley於1367年出生在英國英格蘭艾可利其維爾時，他的父親Richard Geoffrey Stukeley11364歲，母親Jane Jean Thomas19歲。他於大約1396年12月6日與Elizabeth FitzRoger在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1441年11月28日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特倫特享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Stuckley于1367年出生在英国英格兰艾可利其維爾时，他的父亲Richard Geoffrey Stukeley11364岁，母亲Jane Jean Thomas19岁。他于大约1396年12月6日与Elizabeth FitzRoger在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1441年11月28日在英国英格兰薩默塞特特倫特享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stuckley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Swiss German Stöckli or Stöckle, diminutives of Stock 2.

variants.name: Stokley
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Stockleigh or Stockley, including Stockley in Rolleston (Staffordshire), Stockley in Asthall (Oxfordshire), Stockleigh English and Stockleigh Pomeroy (Devon), and Stockley in Brancepeth (Durham); the placenames all derive from Old English stocc ‘tree trunk, stump’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variant of Stokesley, a habitational name from Stokesley (North Yorkshire). The placename appears to derive from Old English stoc ‘place, secondary settlement’ (genitive stoces) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Stuckley was born in 1367, in Ridgewell, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Geoffrey Stukeley, was 11364 and his mother, Jane Jean Thomas, was 19. He married Elizabeth FitzRoger about 6 December 1396, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 28 November 1441, in Trent, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Stuckley est né en 1367, à Ridgewell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Geoffrey Stukeley, avait 11364 ans et sa mère, Jane Jean Thomas, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzRoger environ 6 décembre 1396, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 28 novembre 1441, à Trent, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Stuckley 1367 in Ridgewell, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Geoffrey Stukeley 11364 und seine Mutter Jane Jean Thomas 19. Er hat um 6. Dezember 1396 in England Elizabeth FitzRoger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 28. November 1441 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Trent, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Stuckley è nato il nel 1367 nel Ridgewell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Geoffrey Stukeley, aveva 11364 anni e il suo madre, Jane Jean Thomas, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzRoger circa 6 dicembre 1396, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 28 novembre 1441, nel Trent, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Stuckley(이)가 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리지웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Geoffrey Stukeley(은)는 11364세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Jean Thomas(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1396년 12월 6일 영국에서 Elizabeth FitzRoger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1441년 11월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 트렌트에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1441, em Trent, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Stuckley родился в 1367 г. в местности риджюелл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Geoffrey Stukeley было 11364 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Jean Thomas, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzRoger около 6 декабря 1396 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 28 ноября 1441 г. в местности трент, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Stuckley nació en 1367, en Ridgewell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Geoffrey Stukeley, tenía 11364 años y su mamá, Jane Jean Thomas, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzRoger aproximadamente 6 de diciembre de 1396, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1441, en Trent, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
